name: Space Time
short_description: Space Time is a classic arcade style shooter with a modern touch. The goal is to destroy space rocks and achieve a high enough score before time runs out. There are 9 unlockable ships, 4 game modes and 3 difficulties.
detailed_description:
Hello and welcome to Space Time! Your goal is to shoot and destroy space rocks to raise your score. The real enemy is the clock...that's right time itself is against you. There are 4 game modes and 9 unlockable ships (including 2 secret ships) each with their own strengths and weaknesses. Enjoy beautiful backgrounds and awesome music as you blast your targets away. Have fun unlocking all 25 Achievements and get that 100%. Try the brand new multiplayer game mode which is fully compatible with Steam Remote Play Together.

Game Modes:
- Mission Critical: Requires 1000 points more each level for 10 levels.
- Double Down: Requires double the score of the last level for 10 levels.
- Defiance: Pits your score against an enemy score in a tug of war style endurance match.
- Head-2-Head: A multiplayer mode where you try to beat your friend's score in a 1,2 or 3 round match.

Accessibility: Space Time was designed so that it can be played one-handed with either hand for those who suffer from an injury or disability which prevents the use of both hands. Thank you again for your interest in my game, this is my first and I hope to make many many more.(The Head-2-Head Game Mode uses controllers only sorry for any inconvenience)
